find_hippogryph.title: Find a Hippogryph (Ice & Fire — spawns in Forest, Savanna, Plains biomes)

subtitle.text: It is not a tool. It is a creature that chose to trust you.

description: The Hippogryph is an Ice & Fire flying creature.
Tameable. Rideable. One of the few mounts with aerial capability
before elytra or late-game transport options.
Hippogryphs spawn in Forest, Savanna, and Plains biomes.
Taming requires patience and appropriate food.
A tamed hippogryph can be equipped with a saddle for riding.
In Ch09, aerial scouting massively speeds up Eye ingredient hunting.
You are about to cover enormous amounts of terrain.
Hippogryph Feathers are also crafting materials for Ice & Fire items.
